# Instantly — Pricing

## Outreach Plans (email sending + warm-up)

| Plan | Monthly | Key Limits |
|------|---------|------------|
| Growth | $47 | 5,000 emails/mo, 1,000 active contacts, unlimited email accounts, unlimited warm-up |
| Hypergrowth | $97 | 100,000 emails/mo, 25,000 active contacts, unlimited email accounts, unlimited warm-up |
| Light Speed | $358 | 500,000 emails/mo, 100,000 active contacts, SISR (dedicated IP sharding/rotation) |
| Enterprise | Custom | 500,000+ emails/mo, private deliverability network |

*Annual billing saves ~20%.*

## Credits Plans (lead database access — separate subscription)

| Plan | Monthly | Credits |
|------|---------|---------|
| Growth | $47 | 1,500–2,000 credits/mo, 450M+ database, 13 filters |
| Supersonic | $97 | 5,000–7,500 credits/mo |
| Hyper Credits | $197+ | 10,000–200,000 credits/mo |
| Enterprise | Custom | 200,000+ credits/mo |

## Credit / Usage Model
- Outreach plan and Credits plan are **separate subscriptions** — you may need both
- All outreach plans include unlimited email accounts and unlimited warm-up
- Active contacts = how many prospects can be in live sequences simultaneously
- 1 credit = 1 lead exported from the 450M+ database

## Key Add-ons or Extras
- Premium (Blue Flame) warm-up pool: aged Google/Microsoft accounts — Hypergrowth+
- SISR: Light Speed only
- AI Reply Agent (Autopilot): included in Hypergrowth+
- Private Deliverability Network: Enterprise only

## TCO Notes
- Flat fee for unlimited email accounts — best value at scale (agencies, high volume)
- Growth plan at $47/mo is extremely competitive for pure email outreach
- If also using the lead database, minimum cost is ~$94/mo (two Growth plans)
- SISR requires jumping to $358/mo — evaluate whether inbox rotation on Hypergrowth is sufficient first
